questions.question: Why does the speaker apologise about the seats?

options.text: They are too small.
There are not enough of them.
Some of them are very close together.

questions.question: What does the speaker say about the age of volunteers?

options.text: The age of volunteers is less important than other factors.
Young volunteers are less reliable than older ones.
Most volunteers are about 60 years old.

questions.question: What does the speaker say about training?

options.text: It is continuous.
It is conducted by a manager.
It takes place online.

questionGroups.question: Which TWO issues does the speaker ask the audience to consider before they apply to be volunteers?

options.text: their financial situation
their level of commitment
their work experience
their ambition
their availability

sections.title: Part 3
sections.context: Talk on jobs in fashion design

questionGroups.instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.question: What problem did Chantal have at the start of the talk?

options.text: Her view of the speaker was blocked.
She was unable to find an empty seat.
The students next to her were talking.

questions.question: What were Hugo and Chantal surprised to hear about the job market?

options.text: It has become more competitive than it used to be.
There is more variety in it than they had realised.
Some areas of it are more exciting than others.

questions.question: Hugo and Chantal agree that the speaker's message was

options.text: unfair to them at times.
hard for them to follow.
critical of the industry.

questions.question: What do Hugo and Chantal criticise about their school careers advice?

options.text: when they received the advice
how much advice was given
who gave the advice

questions.question: When discussing their future, Hugo and Chantal disagree on

options.text: which is the best career in fashion.
when to choose a career in fashion.
why they would like a career in fashion.

questions.question: How does Hugo feel about being an unpaid assistant?

options.text: He is realistic about the practice.
He feels the practice is dishonest.
He thinks others want to change the practice.

questionGroups.question: Which TWO mistakes did the speaker admit she made in her first job?

options.text: being dishonest to her employer
paying too much attention to how she looked
expecting to become well known
trying to earn a lot of money
openly disliking her client

questionGroups.question: Which TWO pieces of retail information do Hugo and Chantal agree would be useful?

options.text: the reasons people return fashion items
how much time people have to shop for clothes
fashion designs people want but can't find
the best time of year for fashion buying
the most popular fashion sizes

sections.heading: Reasons for overpopulation at Majete National Park
Problems caused by elephant overpopulation
items: • greater competition, causing hunger for elephants

sections.heading: The translocation process
items: • a suitable group of elephants from the same 32 ______ was selected
• vets and park staff made use of 33 ______ to help guide the elephants into an open plain

• elephants had to be turned on their 35 ______ to avoid damage to their lungs
• elephants' 36 ______ had to be monitored constantly
• tracking devices were fitted to the matriarchs
• data including the size of their tusks and 37 ______ was taken
• elephants were taken by truck to their new reserve

sections.heading: Advantages of translocation at Nkhotakota Wildlife Park
items: • a reduction in the number of poachers and 39 ______
• an example of conservation that other parks can follow
• an increase in 40 ______ as a contributor to GDP
